overall.description: Game engine footage from GTA V showing a first-person driving perspective through a sunlit urban boulevard lined with palm trees. The vehicle follows traffic through a multi-lane road, approaches an intersection, and stops at a red light while pedestrians cross.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban boulevard with palm tree landscaping

events.description: dark colored sedan passes by on the left side of the vehicle

agents.ego_description: driving forward on a multi-lane road, maintaining position behind a dark sedan

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving ahead in the same lane at steady speed

entered.detail: row of tall palm trees lining the left side of the boulevard
green hedge and black metal fence running parallel to the sidewalk
concrete bridge overpass crossing over the road on the right side
cluster of tall glass and steel office buildings visible in the distance
tall street lamps along the left sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Driving along a sunlit urban boulevard lined with palm trees on the left and a grassy embankment with an overpass on the right. The road stretches toward a distant modern skyline while the vehicle maintains a steady position behind a dark sedan.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching urban intersection with commercial buildings

events.description: vehicle ahead signals and changes lanes to the right, slowing down

agents.ego_description: continuing straight as the car ahead moves to the right lane, approaching the intersection

notable_agents.action: dark sedan changing to the right lane and decelerating

entered.detail: low-rise commercial building with red signage and canopy on the corner
overhead metal structure supporting traffic signals above the intersection

segments.scene_description: Approaching an urban intersection as the vehicle ahead moves to the right lane. A gas station becomes visible on the left corner while traffic lights hang overhead against the backdrop of the downtown skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection crosswalk with traffic control

events.description: vehicle comes to a complete stop at the red traffic light
pedestrians enter the crosswalk and begin crossing in front of the vehicle

agents.ego_description: stopped at the red light waiting for pedestrians to clear the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: person in red shirt and jeans walking across the crosswalk from right to left
person in light colored clothing crossing the street

entered.detail: white painted pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: Stopped at a red light at the intersection, with white crosswalk markings visible on the road. Pedestrians are actively crossing in front of the vehicle while the gas station remains visible on the left corner and the downtown skyline looms ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person driving perspective along a sunlit urban boulevard that culminates in a complete stop at a busy city intersection. It begins by cruising past a line of palm trees and a grassy embankment, maintaining a steady distance behind a dark sedan as a modern skyline looms in the distance. As the vehicle approaches the intersection, the car ahead shifts into the right lane, revealing a gas station on the left corner beneath overhead traffic lights. The scene then shifts to a standstill at a red light, where the camera looks out over white crosswalk markings. Finally, the view settles on pedestrians crossing the street while the downtown skyline remains framed ahead.
